# Kaiser Tech

> Kaiser Tech builds custom software, integrations and internal systems for B2B operations that need to move from manual work to traceable, maintainable and scalable software.

Kaiser Tech is a Brazilian technology consulting company focused on operational software, system integration, legacy modernization, infrastructure optimization, database performance and FinOps. The site is available in Portuguese, English and German.

The main conversion action is the contact form on the website, where companies describe an operational bottleneck, manual dependency, spreadsheet-heavy workflow or integration problem.

## Official Site

- [Kaiser Tech in Portuguese](https://kaisertec.com.br/pt-BR/): Main Portuguese homepage for Brazil.
- [Kaiser Tech in English](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/): English homepage for international visitors.
- [Kaiser Tech in German](https://kaisertec.com.br/de-DE/): German homepage for DACH visitors.
- [Privacy Policy](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/privacy-policy): How Kaiser Tech handles personal data, analytics and contact form information.

## Primary Services

- [Custom software](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/custom-software): Internal systems, portals, automations and B2B operational platforms.
- [Custom integrations](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/custom-integrations): Integrations between ERPs, CRMs, payment gateways, spreadsheets, legacy APIs and external services.
- [Legacy refactoring](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/legacy-refactoring): Incremental modernization for systems that still matter to the business.
- [Infrastructure optimization](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/infrastructure-optimization): Cloud, Kubernetes readiness, reliability and infrastructure cost improvements.
- [Code refactoring](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/code-refactoring): Codebase improvement for maintainability and safer evolution.
- [Database performance](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/database-performance): Query, indexing, sharding, caching and data-access performance work.
- [FinOps](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/finops): Cloud cost visibility and optimization.

## Case Studies

- [ACIPG Bolao](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/cases/acipg-bolao): Case study involving a high-demand campaign and operational software delivery.
- [S4 Treinamentos](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/cases/s4-treinamentos): Case study for training operations and digital workflows.
- [Routini](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/cases/routini): Case study for operational workflow software.
- [Amicord](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/cases/amicord): Case study for a digital product and operational system.

## Good-Fit Searches

- [Software sob medida](https://kaisertec.com.br/pt-BR/solucoes/software-sob-medida): Consultoria de software sob medida para operacoes B2B no Brasil.
- [Integracoes sob medida](https://kaisertec.com.br/pt-BR/solucoes/integracoes-sob-medida): Integracao entre sistemas empresariais, ERPs, CRMs, APIs e planilhas.
- [Custom software consulting](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/custom-software): Custom software consulting company for B2B operations.
- [B2B system integration](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/solutions/custom-integrations): Software consultancy for operational workflows and business integrations.
- [Individuelle Softwareentwicklung](https://kaisertec.com.br/de-DE/loesungen/massgeschneiderte-software): Individuelle Softwareentwicklung fuer B2B-Unternehmen.
- [Systemintegration fuer Unternehmen](https://kaisertec.com.br/de-DE/loesungen/massgeschneiderte-integrationen): B2B Softwareberatung fuer operative Workflows.

## Proof Points

- [Cases](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/#cases): Public examples include ACIPG Bolao, S4 Treinamentos, Routini and Amicord.
- [Method](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/#method): Kaiser Tech starts with diagnosis, separates symptoms from likely causes and then defines next steps.
- [Technical proof](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/#proof): The company focuses on traceable systems, integrations, maintainability and operational reliability.
- [Contact](https://kaisertec.com.br/en/#contact): The best next step is to describe the operational pain through the site form.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://kaisertec.com.br/sitemap.xml): Canonical indexable URLs and localized alternates.
- [Robots](https://kaisertec.com.br/robots.txt): Crawl access directives for search and AI-related crawlers.
